name: FightKaiAgrona
_source: s;Agrona;You fight for truth and yet you still side with her.|She has deceived you this whole time.|Why do you continue to fight for a liar?;StyleNid=boss_convo_left;MessageTail=None

s;Kai;Don't get me wrong.{br}I'm not fighting for her.|I'm fighting for myself and this world I happen to live in.|It's only by coincidence that our goals align.|{c:e;Kai;CloseEyes,Smile}So, I'd appreciate it if you let me do my thing.|I ain't changing sides{br}just for this.|{c:e;Kai;NormalBlink,Smile}I'm a mercenary by trade.{br}And she still needs to pay me.;StyleNid=boss_convo_right;MessageTail=None
